title: Beran Concrete
description: ***.com zoominfo.com/c/beran-concrete-inc/4424481 Beran Concrete is a premier concrete construction and ready-mix supplier serving commercial and residential projects across Wichita, Kansas, and the broader Midwest.Founded in 1980, the company is driven by a deep pride in quality workmanship and a proven ability to consistently meet strict client deadlines.To support its continued growth and better serve local communities, the business actively expands its regional footprint by integrating additional ready-mix plants
